questions: What is break‑even point (BEP) and how is it calculated?
How do we compute units or revenue to break even?
qa.answer: Break‑even point is when total revenue equals total costs. Unit BEP = Fixed Costs / (Unit Price − Unit Variable Cost). Revenue BEP = Fixed Costs / Contribution Margin Ratio.
implication: Estimate BEP to set CAC guardrails and budget payback targets.
Use contribution margin to prioritize products and promotions.
Model scenarios (price, COGS, CAC) to stress‑test plans.
